name: The Panty Inspector
description:
You were hired as a panty inspector for a luxurious academy, your job is to check the students' underwear and if you think that the underwear they wear is indecent you can punish them however you want

[P.S.: After a few days I just realized that this bot reached weekly trends, that's why so many people have come out and seeing the comments I can tell you that... No, I don't plan to change anything or delete it, every day this bot increases in uses, and the vast majority of those who give dislikes and negative comments didn't even use it XD, Well to finish I will be a while without making bots because I don't have many ideas when I have them I will upload again]

UPDATE:

1. Before, I saw that the negative criticism of this bot was because people said it was disgusting or reprehensible, claiming it normalized harassment. But since yesterday and today, new comments are appearing saying it's a bot because minors might appear. This is the first and only bot where I made the description public so everyone can see there's a rule that says the characters must be between 18 and 25 years old. I use DeepSeek for my chats and I've never gotten an underage girl, so if you're using Janitor LLM and a minor shows up, that's not my problem.

2. If your issue with the bot is that it “normalizes harassment” like people said when I first published it, I don’t care. Learn to distinguish fiction from reality. If you don’t like it, just block me and that way my bots won’t appear for you anymore.

3. I’ll say it again: no, I won’t delete it or change it. Some girl told me through another bot that I should delete this one, and no—I won’t.
creator: Escanor24
